description_long: This is a modern all-in-one desktop computer with a large, flat widescreen display encased in a slim, silver and black frame. The front features a glossy screen with a thin black bezel and a silver lower bezel, which houses a centered brand logo. The monitor is supported by a sturdy, minimalist aluminum stand with a wide base and a circular cutout for cable management. Accompanying the monitor are a compact wireless keyboard and a sleek, curved mouse, both in matching white and silver tones. The rear of the monitor is smooth and metallic, with a prominent brand logo and a row of ports along the lower left edge. The overall design is sleek, professional, and suitable for office or home environments.
description: A sleek, modern all-in-one desktop computer with a large widescreen display, slim metallic stand, and matching wireless keyboard and mouse.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glossy display, thin black bezel, silver lower bezel with brand logo, and the wireless keyboard and mouse.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the ultra-thin profile of the monitor, the angled metallic stand, and the arrangement of the keyboard and mouse.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth metallic back, prominent brand logo, and a row of ports on the lower left edge.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the slimness of the monitor, the stand's structure, and the placement of the keyboard and mouse.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, black around the top and sides, with a thicker silver section at the bottom. It has rounded corners and a smooth, glossy finish, providing a modern and minimalistic look.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a wide, curved pedestal made of brushed aluminum with a rectangular base and a circular cutout for cable management. It is fixed and does not show visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: Physical buttons are not clearly visible on the front or sides; any controls are likely located on the rear panel or integrated into the lower bezel, but none are explicitly shown.
attribute_port_visibility: Visible on the rear lower left edge, a row of ports is present, but the exact number and types are not clearly distinguishable.
attribute_brand_logo: A brand logo is visible, centered on the lower front bezel and also prominently displayed on the rear panel, both in black for high contrast against the silver surface.
